name: Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275 degrees.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie pan.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until frothy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating continuously until stiff peaks form. Spread over the bottom and sides of the prepared pie pan. Meringue will puff up during baking, so spread only to the top edge of the pan.
5. Bake for 60 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and leave the crust inside to cool and dry.
7. In a small saucepan, combine filling ingredients (except whipped cream) and cook over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
8. Cool mixture.
9. Fold into whipped cream.
10. Pour into meringue shell.
11. Refrigerate overnight. Garnish with thin lemon slices or grated lemon peel if desired.
9-inch pie.
